══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hadozee — Armored Escapist --- HP: 33/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:2+6=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
